Side by side: price, parts, labor, warranty

This looks like an insurance / body-shop estimate

Body shop and insurance-claim estimates use different pricing models (Mitchell / CCC / Audatex labor units, deductibles, paint matching). Our mechanic benchmarks may not apply here. Compare the totals below carefully and ask the body shop for an itemized parts + labor breakdown.

FOR CLAUDE, CURSOR & CHATGPT USERS
Run this in your AI assistant

If you already use Claude Desktop, Cursor, or another MCP-compatible assistant, install the Woogoro Auto Repair MCP. Your assistant becomes a quote auditor: paste the shop estimate into chat, get the same flywheel-calibrated price check this page produces — plus warranty-dispute templates and a phone-negotiation script, all in one conversation.

5 tools: parse quote, check errors, look up fair price, draft warranty dispute, generate phone script
Compares labor hours to MOTOR flat-rate guide and parts to typical 25–40% markup
Cites Magnuson-Moss Warranty Act (15 USC §§ 2301-2312) and NHTSA recall coverage (49 USC § 30120(g)(1))
Free. No API key. No account. Hosted at $0/mo.
Install in 30 seconds
All 4 Woogoro MCPs
Or paste this into Claude Desktop config
Estimates reflect metro-area average labor rates and industry-typical parts ranges. Actual shop quotes vary based on vehicle condition, specific parts, and local pricing. Use as a benchmark, not a guarantee. Not professional automotive advice.
